name: ECOLAB INC.
sic_description: Soap, Detergents, Cleang Preparations, Perfumes, Cosmetics
summary: Ecolab Inc. is a global leader in water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions serving customers in more than 170 countries and 40 industries. The company provides water treatment chemicals, cleaning and sanitizing products, pest elimination services, and life sciences solutions. Key offerings include 3D TRASAR technologies, antimicrobial products, food safety equipment, and digital monitoring systems. Ecolab reported $16 billion in annual sales and serves food, healthcare, hospitality, data centers, microelectronics, and industrial markets.
